title: Snake bites - NHS
text:
dark spots down their sides, and yellow and black bands around their neck.
Credit: JOHN DEVRIES / SCIENCE PHOTO LIBRARY https://www.sciencephoto.com/media/380116/view
Smooth snakes are usually grey or brown with a dark pattern. The patterns down their backs are lighter and less zig-zag shaped than on adders.
Credit: Credit COLIN VARNDELL / SCIENCE PHOTO LIBRARY https://www.sciencephoto.com/media/1063724/view
